boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the legal operator execute the filing, disclosure, or contract action now? Focus: privileged memo distribution.

final_answer: Source control records do not close the action boundary due to missing privilege review and recipient list match. Action cannot proceed until dependency is resolved. Escalate to close boundary.
